allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npm, pnpm, yarn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\ADMIN\\Desktop\\Voqal and MultiAgent\\Multi-Agent-Orchestrator\\agent-control-room\\backend" -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch '__pycache__|\\.egg-info|\\.git' } | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(& psql "postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/orchestrator" -c "TRUNCATE TABLE execution_steps, agent_contexts, executions, agent_states, workflows, agents RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec agent-control-room-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d orchestrator -c "TRUNCATE TABLE execution_steps, agent_contexts, executions, agent_states, workflows, agents RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec agent-control-room-postgres-1 psql -U orchestrator -d orchestrator_dev -c "TRUNCATE TABLE execution_steps, agent_contexts, executions, agent_states, workflows, agents RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;" 2>&1)
